title: ACADIA Pharma Q1 2021 Earnings Preview
text: ACADIA Pharma Q1 2021 Earnings Preview. The consensus EPS estimate was -$0.53 and the consensus revenue estimate was $112.01M, representing a 24.4% year-over-year increase. Over the preceding 2 years, ACAD had beaten EPS estimates 63% of the time and beaten revenue estimates 75% of the time, indicating a strong track record of positive surprises. NUPLAZID continued to show strong sales momentum in early 2021. Investors were optimistic about the company's ability to continue growing despite pandemic-related challenges to in-person patient visits. The company demonstrated resilience in its core business metrics.
